race.comment: HARSH (6) finally put it all together last time on the back of some strong efforts, making a complete mess of her rivals on the Parks track. Looks a progressive stayer that can make it two on the bounce. WUDDZZ (3) loves the wet and will be hoping the rain stays around. Rates highly on best figures and will be skipping through it late. ROMANS LUCK (8) gave a bold sight fresh here but lacked a fitness edge, fading into third in what has proven a strong form reference. Too bad to be true last time but willing to forgive off a 35-day freshen. Expect him to give a bold sight. MY UNCLE DID IT (7) continues to be well supported and has only just missed in her last two. Is another that will look to push forward and under the light weight she could prove tough to rein in. SAVATOFF (5) is mixing his form but has peaks that measure up. Keeping safe.
